subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Ram
subcodes.first_line: Fear ye God, O people of the earth, and think not that the wine We have mentioned in Our Tablet is the wine which men drink
subcodes.first_line_orig: اتقوا الله یا ملا الارض و لاتظنوا فیما اذکرناه فی اللوح باسم الرام رام الذی
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @alcohol and drugs; tobacco; opium, @spiritual transformation
